<!--
Thanks for contributing to cli-setup!
Title format: [Type] description, where Type is a Git Flow type with its
first letter uppercase: Feature | Bugfix | Release | Hotfix.
Start the description with a capital letter, and wrap commands, file names,
and identifiers in `backticks`. e.g. "[Feature] Add `doctor` command".
CI/CD runs the gates (cog check, shellcheck, shfmt, shellspec, Bash 3.2).
-->

## Summary

## What this PR generates

<!--
The deliverables/outcomes: what exists after this merges (vs. the Summary's
why). Product-focused bullet points in general terms — not a file list.
Examples:
- Adds the `doctor` command so users can self-diagnose their environment.
- Updates the setup docs to cover the new profiles flow.
- Establishes the future docs structure for the CLI reference.
-->
